channel.title: SettleWire
channel.description: Prediction markets news: regulation, volume, deals and data.

item.title: Muni Bond Market Eyes Prediction Markets as Risk and Opportunity
item.description: Municipal bond analysts warn that the rapid growth of prediction markets like Kalshi and Polymarket introduces both pricing opportunities and liquidity risks for the $4 trillion muni sector, according to Bond Buyer.

item.title: Kalshi appeals NY court loss blocking sports event-contract state enforcement
item.description: Kalshi filed a same-day appeal to the Second Circuit on Tuesday, July 8, 2026, after SDNY Judge Analisa Torres denied its bid to stop New York State Gaming Commission officials from enforcing state gambling laws against its sports event contracts.

item.title: Polymarket Races to Rebuild Trust With US Market Recommitment
item.description: Polymarket is mounting a campaign to restore credibility and re-enter the US prediction-market space after a period of regulatory uncertainty and reputational damage, according to reporting by AP News and Yahoo Finance.

item.title: NY Court Lets Gambling Claims Against Kalshi Sports Contracts Proceed
item.description: A New York court declined to dismiss gambling-related claims against Kalshi's sports event contracts, allowing the legal challenge to move forward in what could be a landmark ruling for prediction-market operators.

item.title: Bloomberg: Prediction Markets Function Effectively Without Real-Money Stakes
item.description: A Bloomberg opinion piece argues that prediction markets can generate accurate forecasts even when no actual money is wagered, challenging the assumption that financial incentives are essential to their reliability.

item.title: Judge Torres Rules Against Kalshi in New York Prediction Markets Case
item.description: Federal Judge Analisa Torres, known for her Ripple/XRP ruling, dealt Kalshi a significant legal defeat in a New York court case tied to the company's prediction markets operations.

item.title: Kalshi loses bid to block New York sports-contract gambling enforcement
item.description: Judge Analisa Torres on Monday denied Kalshi's emergency motion to prevent New York authorities from enforcing state gambling laws against its sports-event prediction contracts.

item.title: Kalshi market prices OpenAI government stake at long-shot odds
item.description: Traders on Kalshi's prediction market are pricing in slim chances the U.S. government will acquire an equity stake in OpenAI before year-end 2025, according to CNBC.

item.title: Kalshi traders see Nasdaq-100 above 30,000 by end of 2026
item.description: Bettors on Kalshi's event-contract markets are pricing in a Nasdaq-100 finish above 30,000 at year-end 2026, implying expectations of a slower second half after recent volatility, according to CNBC.

item.title: Polymarket World Cup betting volume reaches $3.9B, attracting Trump and Zuckerberg
item.description: Polymarket's prediction-market wagering on the FIFA World Cup surpassed $3.9 billion in volume, drawing interest from Donald Trump and Mark Zuckerberg in the platform's explosive growth.

item.title: Polymarket enables instant Bitcoin deposits via Lightning Network
item.description: Polymarket activated instant Bitcoin deposits through the Lightning Network on Tuesday, powered by the Spark protocol, giving users a faster, lower-cost on-ramp to fund prediction-market positions.

item.title: Roosevelt Institute: Kalshi retail users lost $500M since launch
item.description: A Roosevelt Institute analysis finds that ordinary retail users on Kalshi have collectively lost approximately $500 million since the prediction-market platform launched, highlighting steep losses for everyday participants.

item.title: Chicago eyes ban on Kalshi, Polymarket trading by city insiders
item.description: Chicago is considering a prohibition on city employees with access to nonpublic information from trading on prediction markets like Kalshi and Polymarket, according to the Chicago Tribune.

item.title: Chicago ban on city employees trading prediction markets on insider info advances
item.description: A Chicago City Council committee advanced an ordinance that would prohibit municipal employees from using non-public government information to trade on prediction markets, marking one of the first U.S. municipal-level regulations targeting the industry.

item.title: Polymarket Insider Trading Case Hinges on Swap Definition Fight
item.description: Defendants in the CFTC's first-ever event-contract insider trading lawsuit are challenging the case by arguing that Polymarket trades do not legally qualify as swaps under the Commodity Exchange Act.

item.title: Willkie Farr & Gallagher Publishes Prediction Market Exchange Regulatory Overview
item.description: Law firm Willkie Farr & Gallagher released a "State of Play" briefing on prediction market exchanges, summarizing the current regulatory and competitive landscape for event-contract platforms.

item.title: Kalshi market hits 94% odds Graham Platner drops out after party revolt
item.description: A Kalshi event contract surged to 94% probability that Graham Platner will exit his race following an intraparty revolt, according to Fox News coverage published this week.

item.title: ESMA confirms binary options ban applies to prediction market event contracts
item.description: Europe's top securities regulator ESMA has ruled that its existing product intervention measures banning binary options extend to event contracts traded on prediction markets, according to fintechanddigitalassets.com.

item.title: Kalshi signs multiyear marketing deal with Pro Padel League
item.description: Prediction markets exchange Kalshi has secured a multiyear marketing partnership with the Pro Padel League, marking the platform's latest push into mainstream sports sponsorship.

item.title: NJ Assembly Speaker Pledges Prediction Market Tax Bill Return in Fall
item.description: New Jersey Assembly Speaker Craig Coughlin confirmed a prediction market taxation proposal will be reintroduced when the legislature reconvenes this fall, after the measure stalled earlier in 2025.

item.title: Prediction Markets Supreme Court clash looms, New Jersey faces August deadline
item.description: A legal battle over prediction markets is escalating toward a potential Supreme Court showdown, with New Jersey given an August deadline to respond in a case that could reshape the industry's regulatory future.

item.title: Polymarket bettors threaten lawsuit over Iran nuclear deal market ruling
item.description: A group of Polymarket users is threatening legal action after the platform ruled against them on an Iran nuclear deal prediction market, disputing how the outcome was adjudicated.

item.title: South Korea grants Polymarket hearing on illegal gambling charges
item.description: South Korean authorities have given Polymarket an opportunity to formally respond to allegations that its platform constitutes illegal gambling under local law, according to SBC News.

item.title: Traders Sue Polymarket Over Strategy Bitcoin Sale Market Dispute
item.description: William Wood and Thomas Bush filed suit against Polymarket in New York Supreme Court on July 3, alleging breach of contract after the platform resolved a Strategy bitcoin-sale prediction market as 'No' despite an SEC filing showing Strategy sold 32 BTC between May 26 and May 31.

item.title: Prospect Markets enters US prediction markets via Crypto.com partnership
item.description: Prospect Markets announced a Crypto.com-backed partnership to launch its prediction markets platform in the United States, expanding the competitive landscape for regulated event contracts.

item.title: Polymarket $50 Sign-Up Bonus Rolls Out via Sports Media Referral Codes
item.description: Polymarket is offering a $50 bonus to new users who deposit at least $20 in July 2026 through referral codes distributed by sports media partners including CBS Sports, Elite Sports NY, and RotoWire.

item.title: Kalshi LeBron James next-team market draws significant trader attention
item.description: A prediction market on Kalshi tracking where LeBron James will sign next has seen a notable shift in contract prices, reflecting updated trader sentiment about the NBA star's future.

item.title: North Carolina Budget Would Legalize Prediction Market Betting
item.description: North Carolina's newly proposed state budget includes language that would authorize prediction market betting within the state, marking a significant step toward regulated event-contract wagering at the state level.

item.title: Maryland regulators sent casino-drafted letter attacking prediction markets to feds
item.description: Maryland officials submitted a letter to federal regulators opposing prediction markets that was written nearly verbatim by casino industry lobbyists, according to Reason Magazine.

item.title: Kalshi's media influence scrutinized in Popular Information exposé
item.description: Popular Information's Judd Legum published a critical investigation into how Kalshi, the CFTC-regulated prediction market, is shaping news coverage of its own contracts and broader political events.
